charts.subtitle: This view upgrades the forecast to a P10 / P50 / P90 style range so you can plan against downside and upside risk, not just one line. It automatically rolls the history and forecast to the run cadence (daily).

root_cause: Recent 7-day revenue is 9.4% down versus the prior 28-day baseline.
Spend moved +21.3% over the same comparison window.
ROAS moved -26.8% over the same comparison window.
Revenue per lead moved -12.8% over the same comparison window.
At the current lead quality, roughly $232,212 of the next 30 days and $643,049 of the next 60 days already looks supported by recent lead flow.
cost currently shows the strongest modeled pull on revenue. A 10% move in that driver maps to about $-767 in average-period revenue, with medium confidence from recent history.

Platform=Google Search | Affiliate=AFF-1201 | Campaign=Brand Search | Ad=Brand Core RSA is the strongest budget-expansion candidate right now. A 10% increase to its recent spend projects about $8,738 in additional revenue at its recent efficiency.
patterns: Best weekday: Friday averages $11,006; weakest weekday: Sunday averages $10,389.
insights.recalibration_note: Recalibrate weekly and refresh seasonality monthly because the app has a full-year pattern history.

statistics_charts.title: Leads & Lagged Revenue Conversion Timing

statistics_charts.subtitle: Compares cost and revenue together so you can spot which segments or months sit on the efficient frontier and which lag behind.
